steps.t: Grufudh is at Gavar Cadlus, north-east of Echad Saeradan. Saeradan has asked you to deliver more pelts, feathers, and herbs to Grufudh the goatherd.
Saeradan is at Echad Saeradan in the Windfells of Enedwaith, south-west of Gavar Cadlus. Grufudh told you to return to Saeradan with the thanks of his…
